---
id: artifact-list
title: "Get a list of all build artifacts"
description: "List all build artifacts that have been generated for an app's build. This endpoint can retrieve artifacts from the archive as well. You can use the created build artifact slugs from the response output to retrieve data of a specific build artifact with the [GET/apps/](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/build-artifact/artifact-show) endpoint or update a build artifact with the [PATCH/apps](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/build-artifact/artifact-update) endpoint."
sidebar_label: "Get a list of all build artifacts"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a list of all build artifacts"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/builds/{build-slug}/artifacts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all build artifacts that have been generated for an app's build. This endpoint can retrieve artifacts from the archive as well. You can use the created build artifact slugs from the response output to retrieve data of a specific build artifact with the [GET/apps/](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/build-artifact/artifact-show) endpoint or update a build artifact with the [PATCH/apps](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/build-artifact/artifact-update) endpoint.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
